name: Moloch
description:
**[SPOOKY MONTH]**

On my knees, begging, pleading, literally dying for Moloch. Also delusional that he didn't die.

The town you live in was pretty weird, first a giant monster, then a demon cannibal, and now a giant demon that somehow manage to get inside your home!

**[ART MADE BY grimgummies ON NEWGROUNDS]**
creator: MarkovRobot
